name: Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and stir in cinnamon, crushed graham crackers, and 1/2 cup sugar. Mix thoroughly and line the sides and bottom of a 9-inch springform pan or pie pan.
2. Beat cream cheese with an electric mixer until creamy. In a separate bowl, beat 4 eggs and mix in 1 cup sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Add this to the cream cheese mixture and beat until light. Pour into the prepared pan or mold.
3. Bake at 375°F for 45-60 minutes or until firm. Remove from oven and cool completely.
4. Mix 2 tablespoons sugar, 1 cup sour cream, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla. Spread over the cooled cheesecake.
5. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes before cooling again and refrigerating for at least 24 hours.
6. For the Raspberry Glaze, cook raspberries, sugar, and cornstarch until thickened. Cool and spread over the cake before serving.
